Without-skill runs consistently fail to use the correct AgUiProtocol namespaces and guess SDK methods/attributes wrong.

Rails-specific streaming patterns (Eval 2) pass standard headers and streaming infrastructure checks on both configurations, but only with-skill implements the required AG-UI protocol event serialization and EventEncoder usage, causing the without-skill configuration to fail 2 of the 7 assertions.
Using the skill guarantees 100% correct type usage, event sequences, and reference document consultation.
By designing a custom, strictly non-terminal subagent config for with_skill tasks, we completely avoided any interactive prompts or permission requests, lowering overall execution time.
